description_long: This is a tall, rectangular cabinet with a dark brown exterior and two vertically oriented, lighter wood-finished doors on the front. The cabinet stands on four slender legs, giving it a slightly elevated appearance. The doors are fitted with metallic hinges and are separated by a narrow vertical gap, suggesting they open outward. The sides and back of the cabinet are uniformly dark, while the front features a contrasting wood grain pattern. The overall design is modern and minimalistic, suitable for urban environments such as offices, garages, or apartment hallways. No handles are visible, indicating a push-to-open mechanism or concealed grips.
description: A tall, modern cabinet with dark brown sides and two light wood-finished front doors, standing on slender legs. The design is minimalistic and suitable for urban interiors.
description_view_0: The left side of the cabinet is visible, showing a plain dark brown surface with metallic hinges along the edge.
description_view_1: The back of the cabinet is shown, featuring a flat, uninterrupted dark brown panel.
description_view_2: The right side of the cabinet is visible, mirroring the left with a plain dark brown surface and visible hinges.
description_view_3: The front view displays two vertically aligned, light wood-finished doors with a narrow gap between them and metallic hinges on the sides.
